source_context:
CV Assistant delivers six major feature domains:

1. RESEARCH AUTOMATION
   - Continuous ArXiv / Papers With Code / Semantic Scholar monitoring
   - Automatic paper fetch with full PDF text extraction
   - Multi-faceted extraction: equations (LaTeX→JSON), architectures, datasets, benchmarks
   - spec.md generation per paper: problem, method, equations, datasets, metrics
   - Obsidian knowledge graph indexing with semantic relationships
   - Auto-generated weekly Markdown digest every Monday

2. LOCAL AI INFERENCE
   - Ollama: local LLM/VLM inference (qwen2.5-coder, qwen3-vl, qwen3-coder)
   - MLX: Apple Silicon neural-engine acceleration (M-series chips)
   - SAM3: image segmentation with text and box prompts, colored mask overlays
   - PaddleOCR: 80+ language text extraction with bounding polygon overlay
   - SD-Turbo / SDXL-Turbo / DeepGen 1.0: local text-to-image generation
   - Hardware-aware model selection via llmfit (ranks models by M4 Max fit score)

3. KNOWLEDGE MANAGEMENT
   - Obsidian vault: hierarchical markdown notes with wiki-links
   - Interactive knowledge graph: paper nodes, concept nodes, equation nodes
   - Semantic Scholar and ArXiv cross-referencing
   - Spec browser with Raw markdown toggle
   - Weekly digest browser with chronological archive

4. ML TRAINING PIPELINE
   - HuggingFace Trainer fine-tuning: select base model, dataset, columns, hyperparameters
   - Live SSE streaming of training output (loss, epoch, step)
   - 11-dataset catalog (classification, detection, segmentation, OCR) with one-click download
   - HuggingFace + Kaggle dataset search with size and download count
   - Dataset annotation visualizer: image grid, split tabs, lightbox

5. AGENT ECOSYSTEM
   - Main CV Assistant agent (LangGraph ReAct, 16 tools)
   - Blog Writer agent: research blog posts from papers
   - Website Maintenance agent: broken links, uptime, SEO audits
   - Model Training agent: training configs, cost estimates, training scripts
   - Data Visualization agent: matplotlib/plotly code from metrics
   - Paper-to-Code agent: full PyTorch implementation from ArXiv papers
   - All accessible via WebSocket, REST, or main agent delegation

6. INTEGRATIONS & CHANNELS
   - Messaging: Telegram, Discord, Slack, Email push notifications
   - External APIs: HuggingFace Hub, Kaggle, Brave Search, Semantic Scholar, GitHub
   - Cloud compute: Azure ML, RunPod (via Power configuration)
   - LLM cache with expiry management and disk usage tracking
communicative_intent: CV Assistant feature domains: research automation, local AI inference, knowledge management, ML training pipeline, agent ecosystem, and integrations.
